pr.title: chore: bump Python 3.12 to 3.13 in actions
pr.head: aac34e665e13f40e30286c9ddbbb264fce6f1108

delta.head: aac34e665e13f40e30286c9ddbbb264fce6f1108

files.patch:
@@ -2,9 +2,6 @@
 name: build-linux-wheel
 description: "Build a manylinux wheel for lance"
 inputs:
-  python-minor-version:
-    description: "8, 9, 10, 11, 12"
-    required: true
   args:
     description: "--release"
     required: false

@@ -2,9 +2,6 @@
 name: build_wheel
 description: "Build a lance wheel"
 inputs:
-  python-minor-version:
-    description: "8, 9, 10, 11"
-    required: true
   args:
     description: "--release"
     required: false

@@ -2,9 +2,6 @@
 name: build_wheel
 description: "Build a lance wheel"
 inputs:
-  python-minor-version:
-    description: "8, 9, 10, 11"
-    required: true
   args:
     description: "--release"
     required: false

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 60
     strategy:
       matrix:
-        config:
+        config: # https://github.com/PyO3/maturin-action#manylinux-docker-container
           - platform: x86_64
             manylinux: "2_17"
             extra_args: ""
@@ -43,10 +43,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v4
         with:
-          python-version: 3.8
+          python-version: 3.9
       - uses: ./.github/workflows/build_linux_wheel
         with:
-          python-minor-version: 8
           args: "--release --strip ${{ matrix.config.extra_args }}"
           arm-build: ${{ matrix.config.platform == 'aarch64' }}
           manylinux: ${{ matrix.config.manylinux }}
@@ -75,7 +74,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v4
         with:
-          python-version: 3.12
+          python-version: 3.13
       - uses: ./.github/workflows/build_mac_wheel
         with:
           python-minor-version: 8
@@ -96,7 +95,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v4
         with:
-          python-version: 3.12
+          python-version: 3.13
       - uses: ./.github/workflows/build_windows_wheel
         with:
           python-minor-version: 8

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          python-version: "3.13"
       - name: Install ruff
         run: |
           pip install ruff==0.9.9
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          python-version: "3.13"
       - name: Install protobuf compiler
         run: |
           sudo apt update
@@ -69,7 +69,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
           python ../ci/parse_requirements.py pyproject.toml --extras dev,tests,embeddings > requirements.txt
-          pip install -r requirements.txt
+          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+          pip install --prefer-binary --only-binary "pandas" -r requirements.txt
       - name: Run pyright
         run: pyright
 
@@ -89,7 +90,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          python-version: "3.13"
           cache: "pip"
       - name: Install protobuf
         run: |
@@ -100,7 +101,8 @@ jobs:
           workspaces: python
       - name: Install
         run: |
-          pip install --extra-index-url https://pypi.fury.io/lancedb/ -e .[tests,dev,embeddings]
+          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+          pip install --prefer-binary --only-binary "pandas" --extra-index-url https://pypi.fury.io/lancedb/ -e .[tests,dev,embeddings]
           pip install tantivy
           pip install mlx
       - name: Doctest
@@ -110,7 +112,7 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 30
     strategy:
       matrix:
-        python-minor-version: ["9", "12"]
+        python-minor-version: ["9", "13"]
     runs-on: "ubuntu-24.04"
     defaults:
       run:
@@ -136,9 +138,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: ./.github/workflows/run_tests
         with:
           integration: true
-      - name: Test without pylance
+      - name: Test without pylance or pandas
         run: |
-          pip uninstall -y pylance
+          pip uninstall -y pylance pandas
           pytest -vv python/tests/test_table.py
       # Make sure wheels are not included in the Rust cache
       - name: Delete wheels
@@ -166,7 +168,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          python-version: "3.13"
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           workspaces: python
@@ -196,7 +198,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          python-version: "3.13"
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           workspaces: python

@@ -2,9 +2,6 @@ name: run-tests
 
 description: "Install lance wheel and run unit tests"
 inputs:
-  python-minor-version:
-    required: true
-    description: "8 9 10 11 12"
   integration:
     required: false
     description: "Run integration tests"
@@ -15,7 +12,8 @@ runs:
     - name: Install lancedb
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        pip3 install --extra-index-url https://pypi.fury.io/lancedb/ $(ls target/wheels/lancedb-*.whl)[tests,dev]
+        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+        PYO3_USE_ABI3_FORWARD_COMPATIBILITY=1 pip3 install --extra-index-url https://pypi.fury.io/lancedb/ $(ls target/wheels/lancedb-*.whl)[tests,dev]
     - name: Setup localstack for integration tests
       if: ${{ inputs.integration == 'true' }}
       shell: bash

@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ classifiers = [
     "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
     "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
     "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.13",
     "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering",
 ]
 
@@ -77,6 +78,7 @@ embeddings = [
     "pillow",
     "open-clip-torch",
     "cohere",
+    "colpali-engine>=0.3.10",
     "huggingface_hub",
     "InstructorEmbedding",
     "google.generativeai",
@@ -132,4 +134,4 @@ include = [
     "python/lancedb/_lancedb.pyi",
 ]
 exclude = ["python/tests/"]
-pythonVersion = "3.12"
+pythonVersion = "3.13"

delta.note: scoped to author's changes: excluded 57 files that changed on the branch via merges from the base branch, not the PR's own work
